ValidationRule.description: Requires End Date when Status is Inactive, Expired, or Terminated
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Inactive'), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Expired'), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Terminated') ), ISBLANK(End_Date__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: End Date is required when Status is Inactive/Expired/Terminated
